title: Player Skins
description: brings modern player skins back to minecraft beta
body:
a babric mod restoring skins to beta minecraft

the mod features the following:
- restoring player skins so that you don't have to be steve
- restoring player capes
- adding slim model functionality to the game
- adding the second skin layer to the game

if you prefer to not have the extra features (capes, slim models, and 2nd skin layer), you can disable those in the config :)

**note: this mod was only tested on b1.7.3. use on other versions at risk of crashing.**
